zh.lifeSummary: 當Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica於1325年出生在波蘭希利a斯吉希時，她的父親Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn45歲，母親Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw15歲。她於1341年2月8日之前與Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年在波蘭卡托維其吉波維亞特 希n斯吉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica于1325年出生在波兰希利a斯吉希时，她的父亲Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn45岁，母亲Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw15岁。她于1341年2月8日之前与Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1367年在波兰卡托維其吉波維亞特 希n斯吉享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica was born in 1325, in Cieszyn, Silesia, Poland, her father, Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn, was 45 and her mother, Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw, was 15. She married Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben before 8 February 1341. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1367, in Cieszyn, Katowice, Poland, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica est née en 1325, à Cieszyn, śląskie, Pologne, son père, Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben avant 8 février 1341. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1367, à Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Pologne, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica 1325 in Cieszyn, śląskie, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn 45 und ihre Mutter Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw 15. Sie hat vor 8. Februar 1341 Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1367 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Polen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica è nata il nel 1325 nel Cieszyn, śląskie, Polonia, sua padre, Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben prima del 8 febbraio 1341. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1367, nel Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Polonia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnicaが1325年にポーランドsルaスキシエスズインで生まれた時，父Duke Casimir I of Cieszynは45歳，母Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsawは15歳であった。1341年2月8日以前にWenceslaus Wenzel Lubenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1367年にポーランドカトウィクイポウィアト シエスズイnスキで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica(이)가 1325년 폴란드 sa스키 시스즈이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1341년 2월 8일 이전 Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 폴란드 카타윅이 파위앳 시스즈이n스키에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica nasceu em 1325, em Cieszyn, śląskie, Polônia, seu pai, Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben antes 8 de fevereiro de 1341. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1367, em Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Polônia, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica родилась в 1325 г. в местности сиесзин, sлaски, Польша, её отцу по имени Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben перед 8 февраль 1341 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1367 г. в местности поуят сиесзиnски, катоуикки, Польша в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duchess Anna Piast of Cieszyn-Legnica nació en 1325, en Cieszyn, śląskie, Polonia, su papá, Duke Casimir I of Cieszyn, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Duchess Euphemia of Czersk-Warsaw, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Wenceslaus Wenzel Luben antes de 8 de febrero de 1341. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1367, en Powiat cieszyński, katowickie, Polonia, a la edad de 42 años.
